caption: A woman with her hair styled in a high bun and curly tendrils sits in a podcast studio, wearing black over-ear headphones and a dark green t-shirt featuring a red circular graphic on the chest. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone with a black pop filter. Behind her, a white wall is adorned with a black banner featuring the white text "BOSS TALK 101", "It's a Unique Hustle", "CAST", and "About It!". A framed picture of a person's hands is visible on the wall to her left. To the right of the woman, a digital overlay displays a red and white logo that says "BOSS TALK 101" and "GET". As the sequence progresses, the woman maintains a similar posture, looking slightly to her left with a soft, smiling expression, though her facial muscles shift subtly as she speaks.
